Gwyneth Paltrow, Scarlett Johansson, Karen Gillan, Zoe Saldana, and Elizabeth Olsen

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?actress ?actressLabel WHERE {
  ?film wdt:P361 wd:Q23215655 ; wdt:P31 wd:Q11424 .
  ?film wdt:P161 ?actress .
  ?actress wdt:P21 wd:Q6581072 .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?actress rdfs:label ?actressLabel
    FILTER(LANG(?actressLabel) = 'en')
  }
}
```
